message:
test: pin aio.h conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_aio.rs covering 5 functions:
- aio_write: submit + wait_complete + verify return byte count
- aio_read: submit + wait + verify content match across impls
- aio_error: EINPROGRESS-or-zero immediately after submit
- aio_return: byte count read-back
- aio_cancel: success-match (exact CANCELED/NOTCANCELED/ALLDONE code
  is timing-dependent and not asserted)

5 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-aio1
